scope: Public official source map for improving SCBE agent-bus assurance, evaluation, training, and DARPA proposal framing.
safety_boundary: Software architecture transfer only; excludes weaponization, targeting, tactical deployment, evasion, and physical drone operation guidance.

sources.transfer: Digital twin mission rehearsal plus AI test agent concepts.
Repeatable defensive agent training environments and benchmark datasets.
Human-AI team digital twins and behavioral evaluation.
Repeated develop-test cycles under complex conditions.
High-assurance parsers, formal methods, partitioning, and least privilege.
Cyber reasoning, open-source repair, and challenge-style evaluation.
Operational AI red-team assessment and robustness under distribution shift.
